svg.text: │ Repeat work with for/while loops and trace loop state. │

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace
JetBrains Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: │ - A loop repeats a block of code so you do not copy-paste lines. │

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: │ - Use a 'for' loop when you know how many times or walk a collection. │

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: │ - Use 'while' to repeat until a condition turns false. │

text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: │ - Make sure the loop can end, or it runs forever. │
